metadata.description: AI Review — automated code review for GitHub and GitLab with verification, pattern learning, and team knowledge

plugins.name: air
plugins.description: Automated PR code review for GitHub/GitLab — 5 specialized agents + Codex, wiki-based pattern learning, self-review/respond/re-review modes, model tiering, session-scoped /tmp, pre-commit drift-check hook, and Managed Agent CI option.
